

#1 - Automated Intimacy by Ry Schwartz & Phil Powis (2021)

#2 - Copy School by Joanna Wiebe & Ry Schwartz (2020)

#3 - Digital Course Academy by Amy Porterfield (2020)

#4 - Copy School 2019 - Live Writing Workshop

#5 - Copy School 2019 - “Money Words” Workshop

Launch Webinar Confirmation Email

Bonus #1 - Webinars That Convert by Amy Porterfield (Lead Magnet)

Bonus #2 - Courses That Convert by Amy Porterfield (Lead Magnet)



#1 - Automated Intimacy by Ry Schwartz & Phil Powis (2021)



Subject: 

(confirmed) shit we need to be honest about… 



Body:



You’re in.



And there’s not much else to say but “see you Tuesday”.



You prob scanned through a long enough story just to get to this point, so I’ll be ultra brief.



We are stoked you’re coming. And I don’t say “you” in a general sense. I mean you you Our list is intimate enough where Phil & I get to review the “guest list” and notice all those who’ve made the commitment to join us. It means everything to us. So rest assured, we see you… we either know you personally already… or are excited to go deeper and learn more and see what kind of magic we can partner on together. Thanks for meeting us half-way. And if for whatever reason you can’t make it, plz do us the solid of replying to this email to let us know so we can reopen the spot.



There will be advanced training: We’re not gonna bore you with “3 arbitrary secrets’ that are essentially ripped from a mid 90’s Tony Robbins tape (massive action baby!). Instead, we’ll be walking you through the advanced, next-gen marketing concepts that are fueling everything we’re doing… and then giving you practical playbooks you can start executing immediately.



There will be an invitation into Automated Intimacy v1.0: We’re all adults in the room. We’ve all been in the marketing game long enough to know that “webinar” or “masterclass” is code word for “product offer”. Truth is, we’re proud and super stoked to show you what we have on offer. It’s a badass deal, that for the right partner, will be game-changing. That said, if hearing about it just doesn’t feel cool, you can show up for the good stuff and then politely duck out when you need to. No offence shall be taken.



Much love and see you Tues,



Ry & Phil



#2 - Copy School by Joanna Wiebe & Ry Schwartz (2020) 



Subject:

You’re in! And that’s no small thing…



Body:



You’re in! 



Beyond stoked that you claimed a spot in our upcoming Obsessive Ownership masterclass.



Be sure to add it to your calendar and get your workbook here



Ry and I are leading this session - and there’s something you should know about us:



Ry is usually pretty laid-back about things. 



Slick-haired, fist-pumping motivational speakers who manufacture excitement and serotonin out of thin air? 



Not his people.



Wedding DJs that believe their smoke machine earns them the right to insist you “get your ass on the dancefloor”...



Special place in hell. 



But moi



I’m… less chill. By a long shot. 



Motivational speakers may not be my thing, but wedding DJs? I have cut a serious rug on the dancefloor (specifically at my own wedding last summer, where, come to think of it, Ry was in attendance and he did NOT get his ass on the dancefloor). Smoke machines and I have never had a problem with each other. 



So I was surprised when, after we talked through our curriculum for Obsessive Ownership the other day, Ry got all worked up and was like, “This might be our most badass class yet.” 



Why is he as stoked as I am? 



Because this is gonna be the most hands-on and hardcore “copy strategy” training we’ve ever delivered. It’s brand new, fresh for 2020 - and it features content (and surprise guests) that we’ve never delivered before. We don’t throw superlatives around here too often - but what you’ll learn (and apply) from this masterclass can absolutely be business- and career-defining. We’re talkin’ the tipping point you look back on next year as that single defining moment when a flip switched for you. 



Because, if you join us live and stay till the end, you’ll be invited to join 1500+ of your fellow marketers, copywriters and founders inside Copy School --- the coolest part being that you’ll get to lock in the most insane package we’ve put together in our 9+ year existence.



Nothing to do now but this:



Get this masterclass locked on your cal, and guard that time block like:







You’ll want to make sure to show up LIVE for this one. 



~jo :)



PS: Here’s what to add to your calendar, if you haven’t already:





#3 - Digital Course Academy by Amy Porterfield (2020)



Subject:

You’re in! Save this email… 

You’re in! Here are your next steps… 



Body:



You’re in!



Let’s fire up the happy dance. 







I personally cannot wait to meet you on DATE/TIME to share everything you need to know about creating and selling digital courses in 2020 and beyond.



Here are your complete details (save this info):



DATE



TIME



LINK





There have been some MASSIVE shifts in the digital course industry… and by signing up and showing up live, you’re literally gonna be at the forefront of the next wave of successful digital course owners.



Pretttttty exciting right?



I absolutely cannot wait to help get you there.



But first… 



Here are THREE super-important next steps to make sure you get the most out of this training.



Get it on your calendar! And try to give yourself a 20 minute buffer before and after the scheduled time. What we’ll be covering can quite literally re-shape your life and business. If you’re not TOTALLY in love with the current state of your business… you owe it to yourself to give ample time before and after to integrate the training and take the most impactful actions. 



Download and print the workbook: I promise I’ll plant a tree at some point  to offset the paper use. But for now, please download/print it out and keep it near your workspace. This will really help you absorb the training and get clear on your next steps.  



Name your course! On page 8, I provide an awesome little exercise that can have your course name locked down in under 10 mins flat. Pretty cool right? It might sound trivial, but don’t underestimate how powerful and motivating it can be to finally have your course named! 



Once again, congrats on taking this amazing first step!



The strategies and insights in this masterclass have literally been 7 years in the making, and by signing up, you’re gonna be part of the first group of course creators to get it!



See you in a few days,



Amy 





#4 - Copy School 2019 - Live Writing Workshop







Subject:

You’re in! Here’s your free sales page template! 

(confirmed) the 15-day sales page in a day template  

You’re our kind of weird.



Body:



Congrats on signing up to live-write your long form sales page with us!



Here’s your workbook (which includes the now-famous 15-Point Sales Page in a Day Template).



And your VIP deets to keep nearby:



DATE: March 22nd at 9am PST / Noon EST. 

LINK: <INSERT LINK> 



When you think about it, agreeing to live-write with us on a Friday morning is kind of a weird thing to do.



I mean… you COULD totally be a normal human and spend your Friday doing normal-human things like…  



… browsing yelp reviews for your town’s best new brunch spot. Ideally one with a liquor license. 



… updating your Amazon subscribe & save account so that you don’t get stuck with more Lara 

     bars than any human should ever consume. 



… politely stiff-arming and ignoring any new client requests that hit your inbox or slack DM’s. #sorrydidntseeit.





.

But you’re not doing those things. Cause you’re not normal. 



You’re over-the-top awesome, and we can’t wait to reward your over-the-top awesomeness with what’s likely to be the most profitable 60 minutes of your week.



Why are we so willing to make that claim? 3 reasons actually:



1. You’re getting full, unrestricted access to the 15-Point Sales Page in a Day Template that’s been actively generating 6 and 7-figure wins for the copywriters and marketers who’ve used it.



2. You’ll actually start writing the THREE most critical sections of your sales page (in doing so, you’ll also end up with a high-converting guarantee that you can immediately deploy across all your bottom of funnel assets -- sales emails, retargeting ads, etc.)



3. You’ll have access to both Ry and I to ask Q’s in realtime -- meaning, you can get live, on-the-spot coaching to nail down your headline or guarantee (aka two of the most read places on your long form sales page).



And… 



If you stick around to the very end (aka what the Most Profitable Person in the Room naturally does)... you may even hear about some exclusive MPP-only perks and bonuses that reward your commitment and newfound worth. 



If that sounds cooler than scoping out the best avocado-toast joint in your neighborhood, then I can’t wait to help you knock out the key pieces of your long form sales page. 



Nothing else to do for now except make sure it’s locked on your cal. 



See you Friday,



~jo





#5 - Copy School 2019 - “Money Words” Workshop



Subject:

You’re in! shower optional 



Body: 



Remember those gross, Brian Tracy-inspired sales books from the 80’s that were littered with so-called “power words”.



A laundry list of incantations that make your prospect “bend to your will”... and render them “defenseless” to your offer.  



Yea… that’s not what we’ll be diving into in our webinar together. Why? 



Cause… 



a) They’re mofo’n gross

b) They stopped working the same year Frasier got cancelled.



--------



Instead, you’ll be getting 7 of the most profitable phrases that we use TODAY.  



As in, in 2019 when your readers rightfully won’t tolerate that manipulative, condescending abomination that some still try to pass off as “copy”. 



Or that hyper-obvious, “who are you even trying to kid”  NLP stuff that packs every second sentence with embedded commands like “NOW” and “INVEST”.



Ew. 



As you’ll see, these 7 profitable phrases are all grown up. 



They don’t watch sh*tty 90’s re-reuns. They don’t wear pinstripe suits. And they definitely don’t try to coerce your prospect into doing sh*t that doesn’t actually serve. 



Most importantly, they’ve taken a long, cold shower -- wiped off the slime with an oversized loofa -- and somehow even increased their conversion prowess in the process.



Can’t wait to put them to profitable use? Great… 



Cos’ I can’t wait to share’em with you on March 20th, 



- jo



PS. Because we’re all friends here (and b/c we all share a mild hatred towards 90’s sitcoms)... let it be known that this webinar WILL include a special invite into Copy School 2019. 



If that doesn’t sit well -- you’re free to show up, soak up the training, and then get the hell out of dodge before the Copy School doors swing open and you might just fall in.



But let it also be known that if you ghost early, you *might* just miss out some sweet unannounced perks. 



PPS. In case you haven’t already done so, here’s the fancy-ass workbook you’ll want to print out and bring to the call. 

























Bonus #1 - Webinars That Convert by Amy Porterfield (Lead Magnet)



Subject:

You did it! Here’s why my pup is looking at us funny… 



Body: 



*Happy Dance* 



Thanks so so soooo much for downloading your cheat sheet:



“How to Choose the Perfect (and Most Profitable) Webinar Topic”.



Here’s the thing… 

Even though this was an easy, no-brainer freebie download.



Please don’t let ANYBODY tell you that this isn’t a huge step forward for you and your business.  



Promise?



Cause by grabbing your profitable webinar cheat sheet, you just confirmed to me that:



Despite any hiccups or false starts in the past, you’re MORE than *a little* interested in making webinars the core piece of your conversion strategy moving forward. 



You’re super excited by the possibility of turbocharging your conversions (and profits)... and eventually putting the whole thing on autopilot so that you can scale your business without being in “hustle mode” all the time.



You want to do it the RIGHT way. Even though webinars are still the highest-converting way to acquire customers, you’re smart enough to know that a good chunk of them totally bomb (or never get off the ground to begin with)... and you want make absolutely sure you sidestep those nasty pitfalls while setting new profit  records month after month.   



See?



Told you it was worthy of a classic Amy Porterfield happy-dance.



(which I’ve been told is some weird mix between Chandler from Friends and Elaine from Seinfeld).







And after helping over 2,000 online entrepreneurs, coaches and course creators launch and automate their first profitable webinar…



I can confidently confirm that these are just a few of the amazing outcomes you can expect over the next few months if you keep going! 



Cool? 



Nothing else to do for now but download your cheat sheet, and join me in the *happy dance* if you feel so inclined ;-)



ALL my best,



Amy



PS. Believe it or not, this is just the start of our webinar journey :-) 



I have a few more valuable surprises that should hit your inbox over the next few days that will show you how to take things to the next level.



But if you’re a fan of happy dances, and want to skip the line in getting my most potent and immediately practical webinar strategies…. 



>>> You’ll want to jump ahead and watch this MASTER CLASS I recorded for you here





Bonus #2 - Courses That Convert by Amy Porterfield (Lead Magnet)



Subject:

Congrats! Here’s what this says about you :-) 

[DOWNLOAD] Hope I didn’t get confetti in your eye ;-) 



Body: 



*Virtual Confetti Dump*



Thanks so so soooo much for downloading your cheat sheet:



“5 Ways to Know if You’re Ready to Profit From an Online Course”.



I know… I know…



It’s just a freebie download.



No big deal, right? 



But here’s why it’s worth EVERY piece of pixelized confetti I just threw your way ;-) 



By grabbing your course creation cheat sheet, you just confirmed to me that:



You’re more than READY to break free from the soul sucking time-for-money trap, and FINALLY gain leverage in your online business through a profitable online course. 



You’re no longer willing to tolerate the crazy overwhelm, non-stop stress, and “what the heck do I next” syndrome, that’s kept your blockbuster course idea locked up in the “someday pile”. 



The idea of impacting your market in a BIGGER way while adding a lucrative new revenue stream to your business gets you “next level” excited.



See?



Told you it was a big deal ;-) 



And after helping over 2,000 students launch their first online course, I can CONFIDENTLY say that all of these amazing outcomes will look *very familiar* to you in just a few short months from now.



Cool? 

Nothing else to do for now but wipe off all that virtual confetti and give your cheat sheet a quick read!



ALL my best,



Amy



P.S. I got a few more surprises coming your way ;-)



You’ll be hearing A LOT more about how to build your own profitable online course in the coming days.



But if you’re a big time overachiever (go you!)... and want to skip the line in getting my most potent and immediately practical course creation strategies….
